mapper.select:
select * from reginfotable,busertable,testinfoRoom,roomtable,testinfotable,testtable where reginfotable.user_id=busertable.user_id and reginfotable.testinfoRoom_id=testinfoRoom.testinfoRoom_id and testinfoRoom.room_id=roomtable.room_id and testinfoRoom.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id and ""=""
and concat(reginfo_id) like concat('%',#{reginfo_id},'%')
and concat(tname) like concat('%',#{tname},'%')
and concat(uname) like concat('%',#{uname},'%')
and concat(rname) like concat('%',#{rname},'%')
